_comment: Ancient Nether Emperor — Renegade Immortal. A supreme nether-attribute beast. Canon: one of the legendary creatures of the Sea of Devils. Commands lesser nether beasts.
name: Ancient Nether Emperor

canonical.appearance: A serpentine emperor beast wreathed in nether energy. Crown-like horn protrusions. Commands lesser nether creatures telepathically. Aura of decay and cold.
canonical.behavior: Dominant apex predator. Commands packs of lesser nether beasts. territorial over vast domains. Can project nether energy across hundreds of meters.
canonical.habitat: Sea of Devils deep zones, nether-aligned pocket dimensions
canonical.intelligence: 7-9 (near-human intelligence, capable of strategy and negotiation with equals)
canonical.diet: Absorbs nether energy, devours lesser beasts that challenge it
canonical.relationships: Commands lesser nether beasts. Respects only cultivators of Nascent Soul or above. Ancient enemy of the Thunder Celestial Temple guardians.
techniques: Decay aura (passive damage to nearby entities)
mutations: Emperor Command — nearby nether beasts gain +50% attack damage and speed
canonical.ecology: Apex predator and pack leader. Controls territory spanning hundreds of blocks in the Sea of Devils.

art_direction.model_notes: Large serpentine beast with crown horns. Nether particle aura. Bioluminescent patterns.
art_direction.texture_notes: Deep purple-black scales with magenta bioluminescent lines. Crown of crystalline horns. Glowing violet eyes.
